Embree, Vice President, Components Group, of Cummins Inc. (the "Company"), entered into a pre-arranged stock trading plan (the "Embree 10b5-1 Plan") to exercise options to purchase a limited number of shares of the Company's common stock, par value $2.50 per share (the "Common Stock"), and to sell a portion of the shares acquired on exercise.

On October 9, 2018, Cummins Inc. (the "Company") issued a press release announcing that its Board of Directors authorized the Company to repurchase an additional $2 billion shares of common stock upon expiration of the Company's 2016 $1 billion share repurchase program.

Smith, Vice President, Financial Operations of Cummins Inc. (the "Company"), entered into a pre-arranged stock trading plan (the "Smith 10b5-1 Plan") to exercise options to purchase a limited number of shares of the Company's common stock, par value $2.50 per share (the "Common Stock"), and to sell a portion of the shares acquired on exercise.

On April 10, 2017, Cummins Inc.
